title: Introduction and Review Scope
objective: Establish the review motivation, scope, and the evidence base that the selected structure will organize.

title: Method Taxonomy and Representational Families
objective: Organize the review around methodological families and clarify how the dominant approaches differ in assumptions, strengths, and limitations.

title: Comparative Method Evidence and Tradeoffs
objective: Compare the strongest method themes, emphasizing where methodological choices shape claims, coverage, and interpretability.

title: Conclusion
objective: Summarize the selected taxonomy, the strongest synthesis themes, and the main future directions implied by the evidence base.
